description_text:
Airsep Intensity 10 Oxygen Concentrator

Marking its presence in the industry for a very long time, AirSep Newlife Intensity 10 litres oxygen concentrator, commonly known as AirSep Intensity 10 supplies oxygen at the flow rate of 2-10 LPM at the oxygen purity of above 90% (+/- 3%) across all flow rates.

Weight: Airsep 10 LPM weighs 26.30 kgs.

Sound: AirSep Intensity 10 produces a sound at 55 dB.

Low Power Consumption Technology: The machine consumes just 590 watts of power, making it the most energy-efficient high-flow oxygen concentrator.

Operating Altitude: AirSep Newlife Intensity 10 litres oxygen concentrator can function up to an altitude of 10,000 feet.

Outlet Pressure: The device has an outlet pressure of 20 PSI, higher than most of the oxygen concentrators in the 10-litre range.

Flowmeter: AirSep Intensity 10 comes with a ball-type flow meter. The flow rate can be adjusted between 2-10 LPM

Oxygen Purity Indicator: It comes with an Oxygen Purity Indicator which constantly monitors the oxygen concentration rate that is being delivered to the patient. In case the purity level of the oxygen falls below 86%, an automatic alarm turns on. 

Alarms: Loss of power, system malfunction and no flow alarm.

Certifications and Approvals: Airsep Intensity 10 is approved by US FDA and is CE certified.

Warranty: Airsep 10 LPM oxygen concentrator has a warranty period of 2 years.

What's in the Box?

Oxygen Concentrator

Power Cord

Filter

User Manual
